cycle_objective: Evaluate independent Flow and Logic improvements against one frozen baseline, then compare only correctness-backed QoR.

acceptance_criteria: Build, exact-scope CEC, and frozen QoR gates pass.
dispatches.coding_agent_task:
PAPER-ALIGNED CONSERVATIVE PHASE: test one reversible, reached mechanism with full compile/CEC/QoR gates.

No previous cycle evidence is available. This is the first Flow Agent source-patch cycle.
Campaign recovery state: phase=conservative, consecutive correctness-backed QoR misses=0.
Strategy: optimization. Target command: `csweep`. Rationale: csweep is the only eval-flow command family with confirmed nonzero signal in batch_search. Targeting known-productive parameters avoids zero-delta cycles.
Promotion gate for next champion: zero AND-regressed rows, improved benchmarks >= 5, and either avg AND improvement >= 1.2% or total AND reduction >= 20. (min_improved_benchmarks=5 (10% of 70 designs, capped at 5); min_average_and_improve_pct=1.2% (early-cycle leniency: 2.0% × 0.6); min_total_and_reduction=20 (for 70 designs))
Increase csweep cut/leaf floors unconditionally in Csw_Sweep before Csw_ManStart to expand the cut-sweeping search space.
